column22:
Jacana Resort is a peaceful and comfortable resort in Suriname, created for both relaxing vacations and business stays. Surrounded by nature, it offers a calm place to rest, recharge, and enjoy quality time with family, friends, or colleagues.
The resort has different types of rooms and suites, including options with jacuzzis and space for larger groups. Whether you're here for a weekend away, a work trip, or a special event, Jacana makes sure every guest feels welcome and well taken care of.
Wellness services like massages, sauna, nail care, and a gym are also available (re-opening soon), making it easy to take care of yourself during your stay.
At Jacana, we focus on friendly service, clean and comfortable spaces, and creating moments that guests want to come back for. We’re proud to be part of Suriname’s growing tourism and hospitality industry.

column22:
Torarica Group is Suriname’s leading hospitality destination, offering cruise visitors a seamless blend of comfort, culture, and experience—all within minutes of Paramaribo’s historic city center (UNESCO World Heritage Site). With three distinct properties—Torarica Resort, Royal Torarica, and Eco Torarica—guests can enjoy riverside relaxation, diverse culinary experiences, and vibrant local atmosphere in one location.

Cruise guests can indulge in curated day experiences, including pool & wellness access, signature dining across multiple restaurants, sunset cocktails by the Suriname River, and active options such as padel. The Group’s multi-outlet concept allows visitors to experience several venues in a single visit, making it ideal for short stays.

With high service standards, secure facilities, and a strong reputation, Torarica Group offers a premium, all-in-one gateway to experience Suriname efficiently and comfortably.
column23:
Prime Location (5 minutes from cruise port)
Direct access to Paramaribo’s UNESCO-listed historic center—ideal for short port stays.
All-in-One Destination Experience
Three hotels, multiple restaurants, bars, wellness, pool, and activities (e.g. padel) in one integrated location.
Tailored Day Experiences for Cruise Guests
Flexible packages including dining, pool & wellness access, and curated local experiences within limited timeframes.
Proven Hospitality Leader in Suriname
Largest and most established hotel group in the country, known for quality, safety, and service reliability.
Multilingual & Service-Oriented Team
English- and Dutch-speaking staff with strong experience in handling international guests and groups.

column22:
Yasmin Luxury Resort – Relaxed Luxury in Paramaribo

Yasmin Luxury Resort offers cruise visitors a peaceful and upscale escape just minutes from the city center. Designed around comfort, privacy, and personalized service, our boutique resort features spacious, fully equipped apartments, a tranquil pool area, and secure surroundings.

What sets us apart is our “relaxed luxury” concept—combining high-end amenities with a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Guests can enjoy flexible check-in, reliable shuttle service, and tailored assistance to make the most of their short stay in Suriname.

Ideal for couples, families, and small groups seeking quality and convenience, Yasmin Luxury Resort provides a calm retreat after a day of exploring Paramaribo.

Experience comfort. Enjoy privacy. Discover relaxed luxuxy

column22:
Escape the City or combine a City Tour – Discover Relaxation at Houttuyn Wellness River Resort

During your day in Paramaribo, take a short journey to experience a completely different side of Suriname. At Houttuyn Wellness River Resort, you’ll find a peaceful retreat surrounded by lush tropical greenery and the calming waters of the Suriname River.

Step away from the busy city and unwind in nature. Lounge by the pool, enjoy a refreshing drink, or indulge in a relaxing wellness treatment designed to help you fully recharge during your visit. Our serene setting offers the perfect opportunity to experience the natural beauty and tranquility that Suriname is known for.

Whether you are looking for a moment of relaxation, a beautiful place to enjoy lunch, or a revitalizing wellness experience during your cruise stop, Houttuyn provides an escape just outside Paramaribo.

Breathe in the fresh river air, relax in green surroundings, and make the most of your day in Suriname.
